name: Christina Treiberg
ai_summary: Has 4+ years of babysitting and 1 year of childcare experience with plans for pediatric OT studies. She is calm, supportive, and located in Phoenix, AZ with flexible availability for full or part-time shifts.

transcripts.q3:
Hi, my name is Christina triberg. I have four years of experience in Babysitting and one year of experience in child care. I've always loved working with kids so much. I find it. So rewarding to brighten their day a little bit and just have a positive impact on their life. I also plan on going into pediatric occupational therapy in the next few years. So I do have some good background knowledge on developmental psychology for kids and whatnot. So I think that really
 if it's me as well. Thank you and I can't wait to get started.
transcripts.q4: I'm located in Central Phoenix, Arizona. But I am willing to commute across the valley for any shift.
transcripts.q5: As of right now I am looking for part-time but I could definitely see myself going full time in the future and my schedule is super flexible so I can make a lot of different things work.
transcripts.q6: If I was in a situation where there was conflict between two children and one hit the other, I would focus on listening first, and giving them both my full attention to try to understand exactly what happened and how both children are feeling. Then I would be able to respond in a very calm, and supportive way to make sure that the situation did not occur again.
transcripts.q7: I know I would make a great up kid teacher because I'm calm supportive caring and I have a genuine passion for working with kids and I would love to do that for the rest of my life. I also want to provide a safe space for kids, no matter what they're going through and want them to know that they're cared for and loved in the classroom and that I care about them. Thank you.
